# link

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Inline-link control for the page editor's selection toolbar.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Editor.FormatAction` → `LinkButton`
  - Uses:
    - `page/editor.Editor`
    - `page/editor.normalizeLinkUrl`
    - `page/editor.OPEN_LINK_POPOVER_COMMAND`
    - `page/editor.useFormatToolbar`
    - `primitives/css/inline.Inline`
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`
    - `primitives/css/ui-kit.Button`
    - `primitives/css/ui-kit.cn`
    - `primitives/css/ui-kit.Input`
    - `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`
    - `primitives/popover.InlinePopover`
    - `primitives/tooltip.Kbd`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
